ValidationRule.description: OMB M-24-10: AI-generated documents require a named reviewer and review date before Approved/Published/Complete status. Blocks unreviewed AI content from the administrative record.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(nepa_draft_source__c, "AI-Generated"), OR( ISPICKVAL(nepa_status__c, "Approved"), ISPICKVAL(nepa_status__c, "Published"), ISPICKVAL(nepa_status__c, "Complete") ), OR( ISBLANK(nepa_reviewer__c), ISBLANK(nepa_reviewed_date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: AI-generated documents require a named reviewer and review date before approval. Set Reviewer and Reviewed Date fields before changing status to Approved, Published, or Complete.
